title: Hiro Yuki
wikitext:
{{Seiyuu Infobox | name = Hiro Yuki | image = [[Image:hiro_yuki.jpg]] | characters = [[Makoto Hyuga]] | birthday = 02-13-1965 }} 'Hiro Yuki' (結城 比呂) is the voice actor who provides the voice for Makoto Hyuga in the [[Neon Genesis Evangelion]] TV Series and Movies. He also provides the voice for [[Extracanonical Characters#Musashi Lee Strasberg|Musashi Lee Strasberg]] from the [[Girlfriend of Steel]] video game. ==A selection of other roles played by Hiro Yuki== '''Dai-Guard (1999)''' as ''Yosuke Sumida'' '''Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team (1996)''' as ''Michel Ninorinch'' '''Soul Hunter (1999)''' as ''Taikoubou Doushi'' '''Witch Hunter Robin (2002)''' as ''Michael Lee'' '''South Park''' (Japanese dub) as ''Stan Marsh'' ==Links== [http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/people.php?id=1097 Anime News Network Encyclopedia]

html:
Hiro Yuki
Characters voiced Makoto Hyuga
Birthday 02-13-1965

'Hiro Yuki' (結城 比呂) is the voice actor who provides the voice for Makoto Hyuga in the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Series and Movies. He also provides the voice for Musashi Lee Strasberg from the Girlfriend of Steel video game.

A selection of other roles played by Hiro Yuki[edit]

Dai-Guard (1999) as Yosuke Sumida

Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team (1996) as Michel Ninorinch

Soul Hunter (1999) as Taikoubou Doushi

Witch Hunter Robin (2002) as Michael Lee

South Park (Japanese dub) as Stan Marsh

Links[edit]
